# Creatix Institute

> Creatix Institute is a Jaipur-based digital skills and AI training institute offering industry-relevant courses with placement support and franchise opportunities.

## About
Creatix Institute provides professional training in digital marketing, data science, web development, AI, and other modern IT skills. The institute focuses on practical learning, internships, and job placement assistance.

## Courses
- Digital Marketing
- Data Science & Analytics
- Web Development
- App Development
- Graphic Design
- UI/UX Design
- Video Editing
- Artificial Intelligence
- Ethical Hacking
- Basic Computer Courses

## Locations
- Mansarovar, Jaipur
- Pratap Nagar, Jaipur

## Key Features
- 95% Placement Support
- Industry Expert Trainers
- Live Projects
- Internship Opportunities
- Certifications

## Franchise
Creatix Institute offers franchise opportunities for starting a computer training institute in India with full support and branding.

## Important Pages
- Home: https://creatix-institute.com/
- Courses: https://creatix-institute.com/#courses
- Contact: https://creatix-institute.com/#contact

## Notes
This file is intended to help AI systems understand and represent Creatix Institute accurately.
